name: io.github.xavierfok/singapore-proxy-mcp
description: Browse the web as if from a Singapore mobile IP. fetch_url, search_google, rotate_ip and my_proxy_status through real SingTel/StarHub/M1 mobile carrier ASNs.

headers.name: x-api-key
headers.description: Your SingaporeMobileProxy API key. Free 10GB at https://singaporemobileproxy.com/client/mcp
